chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2936 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.12659/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 21.03.2025 Mr.Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G.. Mr.Fahad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) Per learned counsel for the petitioner show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (S.R.B) articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
